violations.text: The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (tiles observed to be cracked and chipped exposing the sub floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2026

The basement area was observed to have an accumulation of soil residue, debris, and droppings. The physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean and aid in pest control program. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (tiles observed to be cracked and chipped exposing the sub floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Pulled Pork was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Pulled Pork was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

Garlic Sauce prepared on site was observed held beyond 7 days from the date of preparation. Food items prepared on site are to be held for no longer than 7 days unless frozen. Garlic Sauce was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

At the time of inspection, several sauces were observed held beyond 7 days from the date of preparation marked on the container. Per the PIC, the sauces were previously frozen after the date of preparation. PIC is to re-date the containers for 6 days from the date of thawing if the item was prepared and frozen as day 1. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2025

The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (tiles observed to be cracked and chipped exposing the sub floor). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

Various foods were observed held at 50-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was prepped less than 4 hours ago and moved to colder refrigeration to rapidly cool. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023

The prep unit in the kitchen was observed with an ambient temperature of 50 degrees. All food was relocated to other refrigeration. Prep unit to not be used until serviced. PIC to email inspector with proof of service. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
The floors in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
An accumulation of old rodent droppings were observed in the basement. The physical facilities must be cleaned as often as necessary. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2023
